# v4 change log

## Added

- Scientific-style names for **435 hypotheses**.
- Formal mechanism codes for every hypothesis.
- Family taxonomy and genus system.
- Test methodology taxonomy with scientific-style method names.
- Metric codebook.
- Platform and surface codes.
- Content form codes.
- Experiment, batch, asset, dataset, and variant naming systems.
- Lightweight preregistration template.
- Named video brief and postmortem templates.
- Reconstructed missing H071–H165 from the deeper thesis conversation.
- Archived the original v3 markdown files under `99_Archive_v3_original_markdown`.
